item.title: 马斯克 v. 奥特曼官司正式开打，马斯克：偷走慈善机构是不对的，OpenAI：他只是「酸葡萄」，没得到他想要的
item.guid: 马斯克-v.-奥特曼官司正式开打，马斯克：偷走慈善机构是不对的，OpenAI：他只是「酸葡萄」，没得到他想要的
item.description:
According to The New York Times and The Verge, the lawsuit filed by Musk against OpenAI officially entered the testimony phase on April 28, local time, at the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California in Oakland. 据《纽约时报》及 The Verge 报道，马斯克诉 OpenAI 一案于当地时间 4 月 28 日在加州奥克兰联邦地区法院正式进入证词阶段。

It is worth noting that the day before the trial, Musk posted over 20 times on X, calling Altman "Scam Altman" (fraudster). Before the trial, Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers first summoned Musk to the bench and warned him about his out-of-court conduct: 值得注意的是，就在庭审前一天，马斯克在 X 上连发逾 20 条帖子，将奥特曼称为「Scam Altman」（诈骗犯）。开庭前，法官伊 Yvonne · 冈萨雷斯 · 罗杰斯先将马斯克传唤至法官席前，就其庭外言行提出警告：

"How can we proceed with the trial when you are constantly making things worse outside of court?" Ultimately, both parties agreed to "restrain their comments" on social media. 「我们怎么能在你不断在法庭外让事情变得更糟的情况下推进庭审？」最终，双方同意在社交媒体上「克制发言」。

Musk then appeared as the first witness, positioning himself on the stand as "the savior of humanity" and attributing the future of AI to two outcomes: "either a Star Trek-style utopia or a Terminator-style dystopia." He directly called Altman a "thief": 马斯克随后作为首位证人出庭，在证人席上将自己定位为「人类的拯救者」，并将 AI 的未来归结为两种结局：「要么是《星际迷航》式的乌托邦，要么是《终结者》式的反乌托邦。」他直接称奥特曼是「小偷」：

Stealing from a charity is wrong. If the defendant is acquitted, it will set a precedent for plundering all charities in the United States.

However, The Verge's on-site reporter observed that Musk's testimony was far from what was expected. He spent a lot of time recounting his personal entrepreneurial journey instead of focusing on the core allegations of the case, and also claimed to be the actual driving force behind OpenAI: 不过，The Verge 的现场记者观察到，马斯克的证词表现远不如预期。他花费大量时间讲述个人创业履历，而非聚焦于案件核心指控，还自述是 OpenAI 的实际推动者：

I proposed the idea, I named it, I recruited the core personnel, and I provided all the seed funding. Other than that, I did nothing.

This statement paused, waiting for laughter, but there was little reaction from the audience. When asked to introduce former OpenAI board member Shivon Zilis, Musk vaguely said, "She's my, uh, chief of staff, and, you know" — Zilis is the mother of several of Musk's children. Laughter immediately erupted from the gallery, but the jury looked confused. 这句话停顿等待笑声，但现场反应寥寥。当被要求介绍前 OpenAI 董事会成员希翁 · 齐利斯时，马斯克含糊其辞地说「她是我的，呃，首席幕僚，还有，你知道的」—— 齐利斯是马斯克数名孩子的母亲。旁听席随即传出笑声，陪审团却面露困惑。

OpenAI's lead attorney, William Savitt, presented a completely different narrative in his opening statement: "We are here because Elon Musk didn't get what he wanted. My client had the audacity to succeed without him, and Musk doesn't like that." OpenAI 首席律师威廉 · 萨维特则在开场陈述中给出了截然不同的叙述：「我们在这里，是因为马斯克没有得到他想要的。我的当事人有胆量在没有他的情况下取得成功，马斯克不喜欢这一点。」

Savitt showed the jury internal emails from 2017, revealing that Musk's staff had actively discussed a plan to give Musk 55% equity in the for-profit division, and pointed out that Musk had never raised objections to OpenAI's monetization before ChatGPT became popular. "This is sour grapes." 萨维特向陪审团展示了 2017 年的内部邮件，显示马斯克的幕僚曾主动讨论给予马斯克 55% 营利部门股权的方案，并指出马斯克在 ChatGPT 爆红之前从未就 OpenAI 营利化问题提出异议。「这是酸葡萄。」

Musk is seeking over $150 billion in damages. If he loses, Altman will consolidate control over OpenAI, and the company will be able to proceed with its IPO plan, valued at approximately $730 billion. The trial is expected to last four weeks, and Musk will continue to undergo cross-examination today. 马斯克此次索赔金额超过 1500 亿美元。若败诉，奥特曼将巩固对 OpenAI 的控制权，公司也将得以推进估值约 7300 亿美元的 IPO 计划。庭审预计持续四周，马斯克今日将继续接受交叉询问。

item.title: DeepSeek 内测「识图模式」，多模态新模型或将发布
item.guid: DeepSeek-内测「识图模式」，多模态新模型或将发布
item.description:
DeepSeek yesterday launched its "Image Recognition Mode" test, alongside existing "Fast Mode" and "Expert Mode," possessing full multimodal image understanding capabilities, not just simple OCR text recognition. DeepSeek 昨日开启「识图模式」测试，与现有的「快速模式」、「专家模式」并列，具备完整的多模态图像理解能力，并非简单的 OCR 文字识别。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, DeepSeek's big update! Finally "opened its eyes" | Includes extensive real-world tests 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，DeepSeek大更新！终于「开眼」了| 附大量实测

From the actual test results, DeepSeek's Image Recognition Mode has a high overall accuracy, and can provide an answer in as little as half a second without enabling thinking mode. For common scenarios such as movie stills, abstract images, and product images, its recognition and understanding performance is good. 从实测表现来看，DeepSeek 识图模式的整体准确率较高，在不开启思考模式的情况下，最快半秒即可给出回答。对于电影剧照、抽象图片、商品图等常见场景，识别与理解表现良好。

What's more noteworthy is its thinking process: in addition to describing the visual content, it actively inquires about the publisher's identity, image metaphors, and subtext, self-corrects multiple times during the reasoning process, and even spontaneously lists questions to verify premises one by one before drawing conclusions, demonstrating a reasoning logic close to human reading habits. 更值得关注的是其思考过程：在描述画面内容之外，还会主动追问发布者身份、图像隐喻与潜台词，并在推理过程中多次自我纠正，甚至在给出结论前，自发列出问题逐一验证前提假设，呈现出接近人类阅读习惯的推理逻辑。

However, the image recognition mode still has clear limitations. In the classic "counting fingers" test, DeepSeek made an error in its first attempt, claiming it was "dizzy from counting," but was able to provide the correct answer after user guidance or prompts. 不过，识图模式目前仍存在明显局限。经典的「数手指」测试中，DeepSeek 首次作答出错，自称「数晕了」，但在用户引导或提示后能够给出正确答案。

Furthermore, the image recognition process currently does not support online search and relies solely on the model's own knowledge base for answers. For newer things, such as Apple's mascot "Finder-chan" launched this year, it cannot be recognized. 此外，识图过程暂不支持联网搜索，仅依赖模型自身知识库作答，对于较新的事物，如苹果今年推出的吉祥物「Finder 酱」，无法识别。

And just yesterday, Xiaokang Chen, a researcher from the DeepSeek multimodal team, posted on X, "Now, we see you. 👀", accompanied by an image comparing DeepSeek's whale mascot from "blindfolded" to "eyes open," which is widely interpreted as a preview of an upcoming new multimodal model. 而就在昨天，DeepSeek 多模态团队研究员 Xiaokang Chen 在 X 上发文「Now, we see you. 👀」，并配图 DeepSeek 鲸鱼吉祥物从「蒙眼」到「睁眼」的对比，外界普遍将其解读为多模态新模型即将上线的预告。

item.title: 曝苹果 iOS 27 将大幅升级照片 App
item.guid: 曝苹果-iOS-27-将大幅升级照片-App
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple is making significant upgrades to the built-in photo editing features for iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Leveraging the Apple Intelligence platform, it plans to introduce a new suite of AI image editing tools in iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27, scheduled for release this June. 据彭博社报道，苹果正为 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 的内置照片编辑功能进行重大升级，依托 Apple Intelligence 平台，计划在今年六月发布的 iOS 27、iPadOS 27 和 macOS 27 中推出一套全新的 AI 图像编辑工具套件。

Reporter Mark Gurman stated that the new features will add an "Apple Intelligence Tools" section to the Photos app's editing interface, including four tools: Extend, Enhance, Reframe, and Clean Up. 记者 Mark Gurman 表示，新功能将在照片 App 的编辑界面中新增「Apple Intelligence Tools」专区，包含 Extend（扩图）、Enhance（增强）、Reframe（重新构图）和 Clean Up（消除）四项工具。

    "Extend" allows users to generate additional image content beyond the original frame or automatically fill in the surrounding scene. Users can drag the edges of the image with their fingers to control the direction and extent of the expansion;

    "Enhance" uses AI to automatically optimize color, light, and overall image quality;

    "Recompose" is mainly for spatial photos, allowing users to adjust the perspective after shooting;

    "AI Erase" already exists in the current version of iOS 26, supporting the removal of specified objects from images, and will be retained in iOS 27.

🔗 Related reading: iOS 27 focuses on AI photo editing, Apple also begins to experience AI anxiety 🔗 相关阅读： iOS 27 发力 AI 修图，苹果也开始 AI 焦虑了

item.title: 新一轮融资在路上，Anthropic 估值或突破 9000 亿美元
item.guid: 新一轮融资在路上，Anthropic-估值或突破-9000-亿美元
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Anthropic is considering a new round of funding with a potential valuation exceeding $900 billion. If successful, it would surpass OpenAI to become the world's most valuable AI startup. 据彭博社报道，Anthropic 正在考虑新一轮融资，潜在估值超过 9000 亿美元，若成功落地，将超越 OpenAI，成为全球估值最高的 AI 初创公司。

Sources reveal that investors have already made offers to Anthropic, with proposed valuations more than double its current valuation. Discussions are still in the very early stages, and the company has not yet accepted any offers. 知情人士透露，已有投资者向 Anthropic 提出报价，拟定估值将超过其现有估值的两倍以上。目前相关讨论仍处于极早期阶段，公司尚未接受任何报价。

Regarding existing shareholders, Google has committed to investing $10 billion in Anthropic at a $350 billion valuation, with plans to add up to $30 billion more after the company achieves specific performance targets; Amazon has also invested $5 billion at a $350 billion valuation and intends to inject another $20 billion over time. 现有股东方面，Google 已承诺以 3500 亿美元估值向 Anthropic 投资 100 亿美元，并计划在该公司达成特定业绩目标后，追加最多 300 亿美元投资；亚马逊同样以 3500 亿美元估值投入 50 亿美元，并有意随时间推移再注入 200 亿美元。

item.title: 追觅全面回应造车：「华为模式」轻资产、自研芯片、押注全球高净值人群
item.guid: 追觅全面回应造车：「华为模式」轻资产、自研芯片、押注全球高净值人群
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Ma Junye, President of Dreame's Starry Sky Project, revealed in a media interview yesterday in San Francisco, USA, that the Dreame automobile team actually began preparations as early as 2021-2022, concurrently with Xiaomi Auto, followed by approximately three years of technical quiet period. 据界面新闻报道，追觅星空计划总裁马俊野昨日在美国旧金山接受媒体专访时透露，追觅汽车团队实际早在 2021 至 2022 年间便已启动筹备，与小米汽车同期，此后经历约三年技术静默期。

Currently, the team size exceeds a thousand people, with R&D personnel accounting for about 70%, and is expected to expand to nearly 2,000 people in the second half of this year. CEO Yu Hao is deeply involved in vehicle ID styling and product definition, maintaining high-frequency communication with the team almost daily. 目前团队规模超千人，研发人员占比约 70%，预计今年下半年扩充至近 2000 人。CEO 俞浩深度参与整车 ID 造型与产品定义，几乎每天与团队保持高频沟通。

In terms of business model, Dreame adopts a "Huawei-like model," collaborating with mature domestic and international OEMs for joint R&D and contract manufacturing, without building its own vehicle factories. 商业模式上，追觅采用类「华为模式」，与国内外成熟主机厂联合研发并代工生产，不自建整车工厂。

At the core technology level, it insists on independent R&D, covering full-wire intelligent chassis, in-vehicle motors, solid-state power batteries, and intelligent cockpits, and has for the first time confirmed independent planning and development of cockpit and intelligent driving computing chips. 核心技术层面则坚持自研，涵盖全线控智能底盘、车载电机、固态动力电池、智能座舱，并首次确认独立规划研发座舱与智驾计算芯片。

Addressing external doubts about the capital chain, Ma Junye stated that they have "reserved sufficient funds for car manufacturing" and introduced some social capital and industrial funds to share the risks. 针对外界对资金链的质疑，马俊野表示已「储备了足够的资金去造车」，并引入部分社会化资本与产业基金分摊风险。

Regarding product pricing, Dreame explicitly stated that "cars under 200,000 yuan will definitely not be made" . The starting price for mass-produced models will be over one million yuan , with some versions exceeding two million yuan. A pure electric coupe will be launched next year, followed by an SUV in the same series. In terms of market logic, Dreame targets approximately 400 million high-net-worth individuals globally, aiming to fill the gap for high-end Chinese new energy vehicles in overseas markets. 产品定价方面， 追觅明确「20 万元以内的车肯定不会做」 ，量产车型起步价在 百万元以上 ，部分版本突破 200 万元，明年上市纯电轿跑，随后推出同系列 SUV。在市场逻辑上，追觅将目标锁定全球约 4 亿高净值人群，意在填补高端中国新能源汽车在海外市场的空白。

As for the analogy of being "the next LeEco," he explicitly denied it , emphasizing that Dreame is engaged in genuine underlying technology R&D, committed to delivering tangible products to the global market. 而对于「下一个乐视」的类比，他明确否认 ，强调追觅进行的是真实的底层技术研发，致力于交付面向全球的实体产品。

item.title: 去年我国 Token 调用量达 21100 万亿，年末日均突破 100 万亿
item.guid: 去年我国-Token-调用量达-21100-万亿，年末日均突破-100-万亿
item.description:
According to CCTV News, yesterday, the "National Data Resource Survey Report (2025)" was officially released at the 9th Digital China Construction Summit. 据央视新闻报道，昨日，《全国数据资源调查报告（2025年）》在第九届数字中国建设峰会上正式发布。

The report shows that the national average daily token calls grew exponentially from over 1 trillion at the beginning of last year to 100 trillion by the end of the year; the cumulative annual token calls reached approximately 21,100 trillion. 报告显示，去年全国日均 token 调用量从年初的逾 1 万亿增长至年末的 100 万亿，呈指数级增长态势；全年累计 token 调用量达约 21100 万亿。

item.title: 曝一加、realme 正式合并为子系列事业部，李炳忠出任总经理
item.guid: 曝一加、realme-正式合并为子系列事业部，李炳忠出任总经理
item.description:
According to Leifeng.com, OPPO internally announced last night the official merger of the OnePlus and realme brands, establishing a sub-series business unit. 据雷峰网报道，昨晚，OPPO 内部发布公告，正式宣布一加与 realme 品牌合并，成立子系列事业部。

    Li Bingzhong, Senior Vice President of OPPO, has been appointed General Manager of the Sub-Series Business Unit, responsible for the overall operation of the unit;

    The marketing and service systems of OnePlus and realme will be integrated under the new business unit, with Xu Qi, former President of realme Marketing and Service, serving as the head of marketing and service for the Sub-Series Business Unit.

At the product level, OPPO simultaneously established a Sub-Series Product Center, with domestic and international product departments, unified under Li Jie, who reports directly to Liu Zuohu. Wang Wei, former Vice President of realme, has been appointed Deputy General Manager of the Sub-Series Product Center, reporting to Li Jie. 产品层面，OPPO 同步成立子系列产品中心，下设国内产品部门与海外产品部，由李杰统一负责，直接向刘作虎汇报。原 realme 副总裁王伟出任子系列产品中心副总经理，向李杰汇报。

At the R&D level, the original realme R&D team has fully returned to the group, with departments such as imaging and hardware merging into OPPO, becoming subordinate units of OPPO's various hardware departments. 研发层面，原 realme 研发团队整体回归集团，影像、硬件等部门并入 OPPO，成为 OPPO 各硬件部门的下设单位。

item.title: Alphabet Q1 净利润暴增 81%，Google Cloud 首破 200 亿美元大关
item.guid: Alphabet-Q1-净利润暴增-81%，Google-Cloud-首破-200-亿美元大关
item.description:
Today, Google's parent company Alphabet released its first-quarter financial report for this year, with total revenue increasing by 22% year-on-year to $109.9 billion, net profit soaring by 81% year-on-year to $62.6 billion, and diluted earnings per share at $5.11, achieving double-digit revenue growth for the 11th consecutive quarter. 今天，Google 母公司 Alphabet 发布今年第一季度财报，总营收同比增长 22% 至 1099 亿美元，净利润同比大涨 81% 至 626 亿美元，摊薄每股收益为 5.11 美元，连续第 11 个季度实现双位数营收增长。

    Google Services revenue increased by 16% to $89.6 billion, with Google Search and other businesses revenue growing by 19% to $60.4 billion, YouTube advertising revenue increasing by 11% to $9.9 billion, and Subscriptions, Platform & Devices revenue growing by 19% to $12.4 billion;

    Google Cloud revenue increased by 63% year-on-year to $20 billion, breaking the $20 billion mark for the first time, with operating profit significantly rising from $2.2 billion in the same period last year to $6.6 billion;

    Other Bets (including Waymo self-driving taxis and Wing drone delivery services) revenue was $411 million, a slight year-on-year decrease, with operating losses expanding to $2.1 billion;

    Overall group operating profit increased by 30% to $39.7 billion, with the operating profit margin expanding by 2 percentage points to 36.1%.

Google Cloud has become the company's primary growth engine for the first time, with product revenue built on generative AI models increasing by nearly 800% year-on-year, and backlog orders almost doubling quarter-on-quarter to over $460 billion; enterprise Gemini paid monthly active users grew by 40% quarter-on-quarter, and partner ecosystem seat sales increased by 9 times year-on-year. Google Cloud 首次成为公司最主要的增长引擎，基于生成式 AI 模型构建的产品收入同比增长近 800%，在手订单环比几近翻倍至逾 4600 亿美元；企业版 Gemini 付费月活用户环比增长 40%，合作伙伴生态席位销量同比增长 9 倍。

Meanwhile, the company's first-party models process over 16 billion tokens per minute via direct API calls, an increase of approximately 60% from the previous quarter, and the total number of consumer AI subscription paying users reached 350 million, marking the strongest quarter in history. 与此同时，公司第一方模型每分钟通过直接 API 调用处理超过 160 亿个 token，较上季度增长约 60%，消费者 AI 订阅付费用户总数达到 3.5 亿，创历史最强季度。

item.title: Azure 增速 40%、AI 狂飙 123%，微软云业务全面提速
item.guid: Azure-增速-40%、AI-狂飙-123%，微软云业务全面提速
item.description:
Today, Microsoft released its third-quarter results for fiscal year 2026, ending March 31, 2026: 今天，微软发布了截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日的 2026 财年第三季度业绩：

Revenue was $82.9 billion, up 18% year-on-year; GAAP net income was $31.8 billion, up 23% year-on-year; non-GAAP net income (excluding the impact of OpenAI investment) was $31.79 billion, up 20% year-on-year.

    Productivity and Business Processes revenue was $35 billion, up 17% year-on-year, with Microsoft 365 Commercial Cloud revenue up 19%, Consumer Cloud revenue up 33%, Dynamics 365 up 22%, and LinkedIn up 12%;

    Intelligent Cloud revenue was $34.7 billion, up 30% year-on-year, with Azure and other cloud services revenue up 40%;

    Personal Computing revenue was $13.2 billion, down 1% year-on-year, with Xbox content and services revenue down 5%;

    Overall gross profit was $56.1 billion, with a gross margin of approximately 67.6%, slightly narrower than 68.7% in the same period last year, mainly due to rising cloud service infrastructure costs (service-related costs increased by approximately 28% year-on-year).

The most noteworthy growth engine is the accelerated synergy between AI and cloud computing. Microsoft's AI business annualized revenue exceeded $37 billion, a year-on-year increase of 123%; Microsoft Cloud's overall revenue reached $54.5 billion, a year-on-year increase of 29%. 最值得关注的增长引擎是 AI 与云计算的协同提速。微软 AI 业务年化营收突破 370 亿美元，同比增长 123%；微软云整体营收达 545 亿美元，同比增长 29%。

item.title: Meta 一季度营收 563 亿美元，净利润同比暴增 61%
item.guid: Meta-一季度营收-563-亿美元，净利润同比暴增-61%
item.description:
Today, Meta released its first-quarter financial report for this year: 今天，Meta 发布今年第一季度财报：

Achieved revenue of $56.3 billion, up 33% year-on-year; net profit of $26.77 billion, a significant increase of 61% year-on-year, with diluted earnings per share at $10.44.

    Family of Apps revenue was $55.91 billion, of which advertising revenue was $55.02 billion, up 33% year-on-year; contributing $26.9 billion in operating profit;

    Reality Labs revenue was $402 million, a slight year-on-year decrease of 2.4%; operating loss was $4.028 billion;

    Overall operating profit margin remained at 41%, flat with the same period last year.

The most noteworthy growth engine this quarter was the simultaneous increase in volume and price of the advertising business: ad impressions increased by 19% year-on-year, and the average ad price increased by 12% year-on-year, both jointly driving rapid growth in advertising revenue. 本季度最值得关注的增长引擎是广告业务的量价双升：广告展示量同比增长 19%，平均广告单价同比提升 12%，两者共同驱动广告营收高速增长。

The company expects total revenue for the second quarter of this year to be between $58 billion and $61 billion, and the full-year total expenditure guidance remains unchanged at $162 billion to $169 billion, but capital expenditure guidance has been raised to $125 billion to $145 billion, mainly reflecting higher hardware component pricing and data center expansion demand this year . 公司预计，今年第二季度总营收在 580 亿至 610 亿美元之间，全年总支出指引维持 1620 亿至 1690 亿美元不变，但资本支出指引上调至 1250 亿至 1450 亿美元， 主要反映今年更高的硬件组件定价及数据中心扩容需求 。

item.title: 汽水音乐超越网易云成国内第三音乐平台
item.guid: 汽水音乐超越网易云成国内第三音乐平台
item.description:
Yesterday, analysis firm QuestMobile released the "2026 China Mobile Internet Spring Report", which mentioned changes in the landscape of the online music APP industry: 昨日，分析机构 QuestMobile 发布《2026 中国移动互联网春季大报告》，其中提到在线音乐 APP 行业格局生变：

KuGou Music and QQ Music both have over 200 million monthly active users, continuing to lead the market; Qishui Music surpassed NetEase Cloud Music for the first time, entering the TOP3; while NetEase Cloud Music was overtaken by Qishui Music, ranking fourth.

The report points out that Qishui Music accelerated its "breakthrough" during the Spring Festival period, with download volumes soaring, successfully penetrating the middle-aged and elderly and lower-tier markets. 报告指出，汽水音乐随着春节档「破圈」加速，下载量冲高，成功渗透中老年与下沉市场。

item.title: AI 分词器存在「语言歧视」：用印地语问 Claude，token 消耗是英文的 3 倍以上
item.guid: AI-分词器存在「语言歧视」：用印地语问-Claude，token-消耗是英文的-3-倍以上
item.description:
Yesterday, AI researcher Aran Komatsuzaki published a comparative review of mainstream large model tokenizers, revealing that tokenizers exhibit "language discrimination": 昨天，AI 研究员 Aran Komatsuzaki 公布了一项针对主流大模型分词工具（tokenizer）的横评结果，揭示了 Tokenizer 存在「语言歧视」：

Non-English users consume significantly more tokens than English users when using the same model, which is equivalent to being quietly charged a "non-English tax".

He translated Rich Sutton's well-known paper "The Bitter Lesson" into 9 languages and fed them into the tokenizers of 6 models, measuring the consumption multiplier for each language on different models, using the token count of the English original on OpenAI's tokenizer as a 1x baseline. 他将 Rich Sutton 的知名论文《The Bitter Lesson》翻译成 9 种语言，并分别喂入 6 家模型的 tokenizer，以英文原文在 OpenAI 分词工具上的 token 数为 1 倍基准，测量各语言在不同模型上的消耗倍数。

The results show that when the same content is queried in Chinese, Claude's token consumption reaches 1.71 times the baseline, while OpenAI's is only 1.15 times. The situation is even more pronounced for Hindi on Claude, with token consumption exceeding 3.24 times the baseline, and Arabic also reaching 2.86 times. 结果显示，同样的内容用中文提问，Claude 的 token 消耗达到基准的 1.71 倍，而 OpenAI 仅为 1.15 倍。印地语在 Claude 上的情况更为突出，token 消耗超过基准的 3.24 倍，阿拉伯语也达到 2.86 倍。

In the comparative review of 6 models, Anthropic had the highest "non-English tax", followed by Kimi; Gemini and Qwen had the lowest non-English tax. Komatsuzaki stated frankly: "Honestly, I didn't expect Claude to be this bad, and the difference is so stark. I believe enterprise customers will be very concerned about these kinds of issues." 6 家模型横评中，Anthropic 的「非英文税」最高，Kimi 次之；Gemini 和 Qwen 的非英文税最低。Komatsuzaki 直言：「坦白说，我没想到 Claude 会差到这个程度，而且差距如此悬殊。我相信企业客户会非常在意这类问题。」

Komatsuzaki pointed out that tokenization efficiency depends on the proportion of each language in the model's training data: with a large amount of English data, English vocabulary is efficiently compressed; with less non-English data, it can only be cut into smaller pieces. Komatsuzaki 指出，分词效率取决于模型训练数据中各语言的占比：英文数据量大，英文词汇被高效压缩；非英文数据较少，只能被切得更碎。

For users, increased token consumption means a direct rise in API call costs, longer waiting times before model responses, and faster exhaustion of the context window. His conclusion is: the larger the market, the more token-efficient it is. 对用户而言，token 消耗增加意味着 API 调用成本直接上升，模型响应前的等待时间更长，上下文窗口也会更快耗尽。他的结论是：谁的市场大，谁的 token 就更省。

item.title: 全国首个「商业人工智能」本科专业获批，中国科大今年秋季开始招生
item.guid: 全国首个「商业人工智能」本科专业获批，中国科大今年秋季开始招生
item.description:
The University of Science and Technology of China recently officially announced that the Ministry of Education has formally approved the addition of a "Business Artificial Intelligence" undergraduate major to USTC's School of Technology and Business and School of Management, making USTC the first university in the country to offer this major, with plans to enroll its first batch of undergraduate students in the autumn semester this year. 中国科学技术大学日前官宣，教育部已正式批准中科大科技商学院、管理学院增设「商业人工智能」本科专业，中国科大由此成为全国首家开设该专业的高校，计划于今年秋季学期招收首届本科学生。

This major has undergone multiple rounds of deliberation over nearly two years, positioning itself as non-purely technology-oriented, focusing on the integrated application of AI in business scenarios. Its knowledge system spans foundational theories across multiple disciplines such as AI and economics and management, covering cutting-edge content such as AI-based business model innovation, AI hardware architecture and industrial ecosystem, business intelligent agents, AI-driven scientific and technological innovation investment, and AI governance. 该专业历经近两年时间多次论证，定位为非纯技术导向，聚焦 AI 在商业场景中的融合应用。知识体系横跨 AI 与经济管理等多学科基础理论，涵盖基于 AI 的商业模式创新、AI 硬件架构与产业生态体系、商业智能体、AI 驱动的科创投资及 AI 治理等前沿内容。

In terms of training objectives, students will systematically master the core theories of business administration, artificial intelligence, mathematical optimization, and computer science, and cultivate eight core competencies including business AI integration, intelligent data analysis, human-computer collaborative decision-making, and business system design. 在培养目标上，学生将系统掌握工商管理、人工智能、数理优化与计算机科学的核心理论，并锤炼商业 AI 融合、智能数据分析、人机协同决策、商业系统设计等八大核心素养。

item.title: 小米 13 系列支持电池升级
item.guid: 小米-13-系列支持电池升级
item.description:
The latest page on Xiaomi Mall shows that Xiaomi has launched a "battery upgrade" service for two devices in the 13 series. The price is consistent with the previous Xiaomi 13 Ultra upgrade, both being 149 yuan for the battery + 40 yuan for labor: 小米商城最新页面显示，小米已为 13 系列的两台设备上线「电池升级」服务。价格与此前小米 13 Ultra 升级的价格一致，均为 149 元电池 + 40 元人工费用：

  • Xiaomi 13: 4500mAh → 4850mAh 小米 13：4500mAh → 4850mAh
  • Xiaomi 13 Pro: 4820mAh → 5361mAh 小米 13 Pro：4820mAh → 5361mAh

It is worth noting that after replacement, an upgrade to OS 3.0.3XX system version is required. Earlier this month, Xiaomi 13 Ultra launched a "battery upgrade" service, supporting an upgrade to 5500mAh battery capacity (original version was 5000mAh). 值得注意的是，更换后需升级至 OS 3.0.3XX 系统版本。本月早些时候，小米 13 Ultra 上线「电池升级」服务，支持升级为 5500mAh 电池容量（原版为 5000mAh）。

item.title: 💡 山姆 · 奥特曼：按 token 计价终将过时，OpenAI 要做的是「智力工厂」
item.guid: 💡-山姆-·-奥特曼：按-token-计价终将过时，OpenAI-要做的是「智力工厂」
item.description:
According to Stratechery, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman recently stated in an interview with tech commentator Ben Thompson that the token-based AI pricing model is unsustainable in the long run, and the industry will eventually shift to a "task completion" based pricing system. 据 Stratechery 报道，OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 近日在接受科技评论人 Ben Thompson 采访时表示，按 token 计价的 AI 定价模式长期来看难以为继，行业最终将转向以「任务完成」为单位的定价体系。

Altman illustrates this judgment with the latest GPT-5.5 model: The single token price of GPT-5.5 is higher than the previous generation GPT-5.4, but the number of tokens consumed to complete the same task has significantly decreased . He believes that users have never truly cared about token consumption: Altman 以最新的 GPT-5.5 模型为例说明这一判断：GPT-5.5 的单 token 价格高于上一代 GPT-5.4，但 完成同一任务所消耗的 token 数量大幅减少 。他认为，用户从未真正关心 token 消耗量：

You don't actually care how many tokens the answer used; you just want to get the job done. You only care about the total price and whether you can access it whenever you need it.

On this basis, Altman revised OpenAI's positioning from a 'token factory' to an 'intelligence factory'. Its core goal is to deliver as much intelligence as possible at the lowest possible price. As for whether the underlying system runs on large or small models, how many tokens are used, or whether it runs on GPUs or Amazon's self-developed Trainium chips, users don't need to care. 在此基础上，Altman 将 OpenAI 的定位从「token 工厂」修正为「智力工厂」。其核心目标是以尽可能低的价格交付尽可能多的智能，至于底层跑的是大模型还是小模型、用了多少 token、跑在 GPU 还是亚马逊自研的 Trainium 芯片上，用户都不需要关心。

Altman also revealed that among OpenAI's current customers, far more people are requesting additional computing capacity than are negotiating lower prices. He draws an analogy between AI and traditional utilities like water and electricity, pointing out a fundamental difference between the two: Altman 同时透露，目前 OpenAI 客户中要求追加算力容量的人远多于谈判压价的人。他将 AI 与水、电等传统公用事业进行类比，并指出两者存在本质区别：

If you view intelligence as a 'utility' (like water and electricity), I don't know of any other utility that makes me feel — as long as the price is low enough, I'll keep using it, and keep using more. There's no utility like that.

AWS CEO Matt Garman added that over the past 30 years, the unit price of computing power has decreased by several orders of magnitude, yet the total amount of computing power sold today is more than ever before. The growth logic of AI demand is highly similar to this. AWS CEO Matt Garman 对此补充称，过去 30 年算力单价已下降了若干个数量级，但今天卖出去的算力总量却比任何时候都多，AI 需求的增长逻辑与此高度相似。

item.title: 小米玄戒 O3 芯片曝光，折叠屏或首发
item.guid: 小米玄戒-O3-芯片曝光，折叠屏或首发
item.description:
According to XimiTime, the Mi Code database recently exposed the specifications of Xiaomi's Xuanjie O3 SoC. The upcoming Xiaomi MIX Fold 5 (internal codename 'lhasa') is expected to be the first to feature it, with an estimated starting price of around US$1,500 (approximately RMB 10,200). 据 XimiTime 报道，Mi Code 数据库近日曝光了小米玄戒 O3 SoC 的规格信息，即将发布的小米 MIX Fold 5（内部代号「lhasa」）有望首发搭载，预计起售价约为 1500 美元（约合人民币 1.02 万元）。

Leaked data shows that the Xuanjie O3 has undergone a complete architectural redesign. The ultra-large core frequency has been boosted from O1's 3.89 GHz to 4.05 GHz, and it will adopt a three-cluster architecture of 'ultra-large core (Prime) + performance large core (Titanium) + small core (Little)', removing the large core (Big) cluster compared to the previous generation O1. 泄露数据显示，玄戒 O3 在架构上进行了一次彻底的重构，超大核主频从 O1 的 3.89 GHz 提升至 4.05 GHz，并将采用「超大核 (Prime) + 性能大核 (Titanium) + 小核 (Little)」的三簇架构，相较前代 O1 移除了大核 (Big) 集群。

    The small core frequency significantly jumped from 1.79 GHz to 3.02 GHz, an increase of about 68%, surpassing the previous generation's large core at 1.89 GHz;

    The performance large core frequency slightly increased from 3.39 GHz to 3.42 GHz, with limited change;

    GPU frequency increased from 1.2 GHz to approximately 1.5 GHz, an increase of about 25%;

    Memory frequency specifications remain unchanged at 9600 MT/s.

item.title: 10.98 万元起，吉利银河 M7 远航家上市
item.guid: 10.98-万元起，吉利银河-M7-远航家上市
item.description:
Yesterday, the Geely Galaxy M7 Voyage Edition officially launched, offering four configuration versions with a price range of 109,800 to 137,800 yuan. In terms of appearance, the new car continues the Geely Galaxy family design language, featuring a贯穿式 LED light strip at the front and an intelligent air intake grille that automatically adjusts according to vehicle speed and cooling needs. 昨天，吉利银河 M7 远航家正式上市，共推出四个配置版本，售价区间为 10.98 万元至 13.78 万元。外观上，新车延续吉利银河家族式设计语言，车头采用贯穿式 LED 灯带，配备可根据车速与散热需求自动调节的智能进气格栅。

The body dimensions are 4770mm (length) × 1905mm (width) × 1685mm (height), with a wheelbase of 2785mm and a trunk volume of 700 liters. It offers six color options: Hanyu Blue, Chenlin Green, Xinghui Silver, Yunxi White, Xuanye Black, and Yanyu Grey. 车身尺寸为长宽高 4770mm × 1905mm × 1685mm，轴距 2785mm，后备箱容积 700 升，提供瀚宇蓝、晨林绿、星辉银、云曦白、玄夜黑、烟雨灰六种配色。

    Equipped with Thor Hybrid 2.0 technology, the engine thermal efficiency is 47.26%, the system peak power is 175kW, and the comprehensive efficiency is 93.1%;

    All models come with a built-in 29.8kWh battery, offering an all-electric range of 225km and a combined range of 1730km with a full tank and full charge;

    The cockpit is equipped with the Galaxy Flyme Auto 2 system, a 15.4-inch 2.5K central control screen, a 7nm Longying No. 1 chip, a 25.6-inch HUD, and 50W air-cooled wireless charging;

    Standard with the Qianli Haohan H3 solution, supporting high-speed NOA, automatic on/off ramps, and full-scenario parking assistance.

🔗 Related Reading: 109,800 yuan, Geely Galaxy M7 Voyage Edition launched, all models equipped with 30-degree battery, fuel consumption as low as 3.35L per 100 kilometers 🔗 相关阅读： 10.98 万元，吉利银河 M7 远航家上市，全系搭载 30 度电池，油耗低至百公里 3.35L

item.title: 极米推出四款旗舰新品，X50 Ultra Max 实现 10000:1 原生对比度
item.guid: 极米推出四款旗舰新品，X50-Ultra-Max-实现-10000:1-原生对比度
item.description:
Last night, XGIMI held its new product launch event for China this year, introducing four flagship series: X50 Ultra, RS30, AURA3, and MIRA 4K. 昨晚，极米举办今年中国区新品发布会，推出 X50 Ultra、RS30、AURA3、MIRA 4K 四大旗舰系列。

X50 Ultra Series: X50 Ultra 系列：

    Equipped with the self-developed "X-Vision Bionic Optical Engine", integrating five major core hardware components such as DynaEye Stepless Bionic Aperture, X-Vision Independent Picture Quality Chip, and RGB Pure Laser Light Source;

    The top-tier X50 Ultra Max achieves a native contrast ratio of 10000:1 and a dynamic black level excitation contrast ratio of 100000:1, marking the first time a domestic DLP projector has broken the "ten thousand level" native contrast ratio barrier;

    Equipped with the X-Vision independent picture quality chip jointly developed with Unisoc Tongchuang, it is the industry's third projector-specific picture quality chip after Sony and JVC;

    The first-release limited-time price for X50 Ultra Max is 17999 yuan, and for X50 Ultra is 13999 yuan.

The RS30 series inherits the same technology as the X50 Ultra. The top-tier RS30 Ultra Max is equipped with the same DynaEye stepless bionic aperture, achieving a native contrast ratio of 7000:1 and brightness of 5500CVIA/6800ISO. All models come standard with intelligent two-way shift, capable of projecting a 100-inch giant screen from 3 meters, offering four configurations from Pro to Ultra Max. RS30 系列承袭 X50 Ultra 同源技术，顶配版 RS30 Ultra Max 搭载同款 DynaEye 无级仿生光圈，原生对比度达 7000:1，亮度 5500CVIA/6800ISO，全系标配智能双向移轴，3 米可投百吋巨幕，提供 Pro 至 Ultra Max 四档配置。

The AURA3 series of laser TVs features a contrast ratio in the tens of thousands, ultra-short throw for wall-mounted projection, supports up to a 150-inch rollable screen, weighs no more than 10kg, and covers 99% of the BT.2020 color gamut. 激光电视 AURA3 系列主打万级对比度，超短焦贴墙即投，最大支持 150 吋可卷曲幕布，机身不超 10kg，色域覆盖 99% BT.2020。

The MIRA 4K series upgrades the previous generation's 1080P to 4K, adding a "Light and Shadow Gallery" feature with over 100 built-in art wallpapers, allowing the wall to serve as a display canvas in standby mode. MIRA 4K 系列则将上代 1080P 升级至 4K，新增「光影画廊」功能，内置逾 100 幅艺术壁纸，待机状态下可将墙面作为展示画布。

item.title: 腾讯 ima 推出知识 Agent「copilot」
item.guid: 腾讯-ima-推出知识-Agent「copilot」
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent ima officially launched the knowledge AI agent "copilot", which supports users in creating their own exclusive AI agents. It supports five major platforms: Mac, Windows, iOS, Android, and HarmonyOS. It is currently application-based and will be gradually opened according to the application order. 昨日，腾讯 ima 正式推出知识 AI 智能体「copilot」，支持用户创建专属 AI 智能体，支持 Mac、Windows、iOS、Android、鸿蒙五大平台，目前采取申请制，将按申请顺序陆续开放。

One of copilot's core capabilities is its deeply personalized memory system, composed of four major modules: copilot settings, user profiles, long-term memory, and experience skills. The AI agent can remember user backgrounds, habits, and ongoing tasks, enabling continuous invocation across scenarios and self-iteration. copilot 的核心能力之一是其深度个人化的记忆系统，由 copilot 设定、用户档案、长期记忆、经验技巧四大模块构成。AI 智能体能够记住用户的背景、习惯与推进事项，实现跨场景连续调用并进行自我迭代。

In terms of scene perception, copilot supports hovering as a floating window within the ima application, automatically sensing the web pages, files, or knowledge base content currently being viewed by the user, allowing direct processing commands without additional file uploads. 在场景感知方面，copilot 支持以浮窗形式悬停于 ima 应用内，自动感知用户当前浏览的网页、文件或知识库内容，无需额外上传文件即可直接发出处理指令。

Regarding the skill ecosystem, copilot's first phase includes official Skills such as knowledge base operations, note-taking, and report generation. The knowledge base Skill now supports reading file body text and can complete cross-file information summaries. 技能生态方面，copilot 首期内置知识库操作、笔记操作、生成报告等官方 Skills，知识库 Skill 现已支持读取文件正文，可完成跨文件信息汇总。

item.title: 阶跃星辰发布 Step Image Edit 2：3.5B 参数超越 20B 级模型
item.guid: 阶跃星辰发布-Step-Image-Edit-2：3.5B-参数超越-20B-级模型
item.description:
StepAhead yesterday officially released its new generation image generation and editing model, Step Image Edit 2, featuring lightweight design, high quality, and extremely fast response. With only 3.5B parameters, the official claim is that its actual performance has surpassed 12B-20B open-source large image editing models across different scales, with a single image generation taking only 0.5-2 seconds. 阶跃星辰昨日正式发布新一代图像生成与编辑模型 Step Image Edit 2，主打轻量化、高质量与极速响应。参数量仅为 3.5B，官方宣称其实际表现已实现对 12B-20B 级开源图像编辑大模型的跨量级超越，单次生图耗时仅需 0.5-2 秒。

On the public academic benchmark KRIS-Bench, Step Image Edit 2 ranks first in the comprehensive ranking of lightweight image editing models. 在公开学术榜单 KRIS-Bench 上，Step Image Edit 2 在轻量级图像编辑模型综合排名中位列第一。

In terms of capabilities, the model supports image generation and editing, Chinese and English rendering, local editing, visual reasoning, subject consistency, and style transfer, covering practical application scenarios such as IP creation, poster design, comic generation, portrait beautification, travel photo retouching, and portrait generation. 能力层面，该模型支持图像生成与图像编辑、中英文渲染、局部编辑、视觉推理、主体一致性及风格迁移，可覆盖 IP 创作、海报设计、漫画生成、人像美颜、旅游修图、写真生成等实际使用场景。

item.title: 生数科技发布具身智能「通用大脑」Motubrain
item.guid: 生数科技发布具身智能「通用大脑」Motubrain
item.description:
Yesterday, Shengshu Technology released the general world action model Motubrain, positioned as the "universal brain" for embodied intelligent robots, unifying perception, prediction, and execution within a single model, enabling robots to truly understand and interact with the physical world. 昨天，生数科技发布通用世界行动模型 Motubrain，定位具身智能机器人的「通用大脑」，将感知、预测、执行统一在一个模型中完成，让机器人真正理解并作用于物理世界。

    Multi-task generalization: The more tasks, the smarter the model, no longer limited to single-scenario training;

    Multi-robot adaptation: One model adapts to different robot forms, breaking the traditional "one machine, one model" approach;

    Long-range task execution: Capable of completing complex tasks with over 10 consecutive actions in one go, rather than just 2-3 demo-level steps;

    Dynamic predictive decision-making: Able to anticipate environmental changes and adjust while executing.

In authoritative evaluations, Motubrain simultaneously topped two international rankings: WorldArena (world model understanding capability) and RoboTwin 2.0 (robot execution capability). For the latter, it achieved an average score of 96.0 across 50 complex tasks, making it the only model with an average score exceeding 95. 在权威评测上，Motubrain 同时登顶 WorldArena（世界模型理解能力）和 RoboTwin 2.0（机器人执行能力）两项国际榜单，后者 50 个复杂任务平均得分 96.0，是唯一均分超过 95 的模型。

item.title: 腾讯混元开源 Hy-MT1.5 端侧翻译模型，支持 33 种语言
item.guid: 腾讯混元开源-Hy-MT1.5-端侧翻译模型，支持-33-种语言
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent Hunyuan officially open-sourced Hy-MT1.5, an offline translation model for mobile devices. After compression, its size is only 440MB, supporting 33 languages and 5 dialects and minority languages, usable without an internet connection. 昨天，腾讯混元正式开源面向移动端的离线翻译模型 Hy-MT1.5，压缩后体积仅 440MB，支持 33 种语言及 5 种方言与少数民族语言，无需联网即可使用。

Official data shows that this 1.8B parameter model comprehensively outperforms larger-scale open-source models like Tower-Plus-72B and Qwen3-32B, as well as mainstream commercial translation APIs such as Microsoft Translator and Doubao Translate, in the Flores-200 Chinese-foreign mutual translation benchmark test. 官方数据显示，该 1.8B 参数模型在 Flores-200 中外互译基准测试中全面超越 Tower-Plus-72B、Qwen3-32B 等更大规模开源模型，以及 Microsoft Translator、豆包翻译等主流商业翻译 API。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/tencent/Hy-MT1.5-1.8B-1.25bit 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/tencent/Hy-MT1.5-1.8B-1.25bit

item.title: 银河通用开源机器人大模型 LDA：「垃圾数据」也能用，还越练越强
item.guid: 银河通用开源机器人大模型-LDA：「垃圾数据」也能用，还越练越强
item.description:
Yesterday, Galaxy Universal Robotics released the cross-body "Implicit World-Action Foundation Model" LDA. Its core algorithms and code have been fully open-sourced simultaneously, and related papers have been accepted by RSS, a top conference in the robotics field. 昨天，银河通用机器人发布跨本体「隐式世界-动作基础模型」LDA，核心算法与代码同步全面开源，相关论文已入选机器人领域顶级会议 RSS。

The core breakthrough of LDA lies in its first-time realization of unified and effective utilization of all types of embodied data—covering various data types such as virtual-real fusion, human-robot hybrid, with or without action labels, and high or low quality. Experiments show that as data scale expands from thousands to tens of thousands of hours, model performance continues to improve steadily; even with the introduction of a large amount of failed data, performance increases rather than decreases. LDA 的核心突破在于首次实现对全类具身数据的统一有效利用——涵盖虚实共融、人机混合、有无动作标签、高低质量等各类数据。实验表明，随着数据规模从数千小时扩展至数万小时，模型性能持续稳定提升；即便引入大量失败数据，性能不降反升。

  • Model Architecture : LDA implements the WAM (World-Action Model) framework, unifying the learning of four capabilities—policy generation, forward dynamics prediction, inverse dynamics inference, and visual prediction—within the same representation space, forming a complete "perception-decision-feedback" loop; 模型架构 ：LDA 实践了 WAM（World-Action Model）框架，在同一表示空间内统一学习策略生成、前向动力学预测、逆向动力学推断与视觉预测四项能力，形成完整的「感知—决策—反馈」闭环；
  • Visual Representation : DINO's structured latent space replaces traditional VAEs, effectively filtering out appearance interferences like lighting and texture, enabling alignment in cross-body dynamics learning. Comparative data shows that UWM's success rate almost stagnated when scaled from 0.1B to 1B parameters, while LDA's performance continuously improved under the same scale expansion; 视觉表征 ：以 DINO 结构化潜空间取代传统 VAE，有效过滤光照、纹理等外观干扰，使跨本体动力学学习得以对齐。对比数据显示，UWM 从 0.1B 扩展至 1B 参数时成功率几乎停滞，而 LDA 在相同规模扩展下性能持续提升；
  • Action Space : A unified hand-centric action space is proposed, mapping all body actions to the end-effector's wrist pose changes and hand contact forms, completely decoupling operational semantics from specific mechanical structures, allowing operations like grasping, rotating, and inserting to share dynamic principles across different bodies. 动作空间 ：提出统一的 hand-centric action space，将所有本体动作映射至末端执行器的手腕位姿变化与手部接触形态，彻底解耦操作语义与具体机械结构，使夹取、旋转、插入等操作能够跨本体共享动力学规律。

item.title: 蚂蚁百灵 Ling-2.6-flash 开源
item.guid: 蚂蚁百灵-Ling-2.6-flash-开源
item.description:
Yesterday, Ant Group's Bailin officially open-sourced the Ling-2.6-flash weights. The model has a total of 104B parameters, with only 7.4B activated per inference, and a context window of 256K. 蚂蚁百灵昨日正式开源 Ling-2.6-flash 权重，模型总参数量为 104B，每次推理仅激活 7.4B，上下文窗口达 256K。

Ling-2.6-flash introduces a hybrid linear attention mechanism based on the Ling 2.0 architecture, upgrading the original GQA attention to a 1:7 MLA + Lightning Linear hybrid architecture. Combined with a highly sparse MoE design, its inference efficiency is significantly superior to models of the same class. Ling-2.6-flash 在 Ling 2.0 架构基础上引入混合线性注意力机制，将原有的 GQA 注意力升级为 1:7 MLA + Lightning Linear 混合架构，并结合高稀疏 MoE 设计，推理效率显著优于同级模型。

In a 4-card H20 environment, the generation speed can reach up to 340 tokens/s, and the peak prefill and decode throughput is approximately 4 times that of comparable open-source models. 在 4 卡 H20 环境下，生成速度最高可达 340 tokens/s，prefill 与 decode 吞吐峰值约为同级开源模型的 4 倍。

In AI agent-related evaluations, Ling-2.6-flash performed outstandingly, with multiple metrics such as BFCL-V4, TAU2-bench, SWE-bench Verified (61.2%), Claw-Eval, and PinchBench reaching or approaching SOTA levels for its parameter class. 在 AI 智能体相关评测上，Ling-2.6-flash 表现突出，BFCL-V4、TAU2-bench、SWE-bench Verified（61.2%）、Claw-Eval、PinchBench 多项指标达到或接近同参数级别 SOTA 水平。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/inclusionAI/Ling-2.6-flash 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/inclusionAI/Ling-2.6-flash

item.title: 微信贴图支持发布 2 亿像素原图
item.guid: 微信贴图支持发布-2-亿像素原图
item.description: Yesterday, WeChat officially announced that stickers now support sending and viewing original images, and in collaboration with OPPO, they support sharing 200-megapixel ultra-clear images in stickers. Currently, this feature is only available on Android devices; users can experience it by upgrading to version 8.0.71 or higher. 昨天，微信官宣贴图支持发送、查看原图，并与 OPPO 合作，支持在贴图中分享 2 亿像素超清图片，目前该功能仅支持 Android 端，升级到 8.0.71 及以上版本可体验。

item.title: 京东美术馆「开箱计划」启动
item.guid: 京东美术馆「开箱计划」启动
item.description:
Yesterday, JD Art Museum officially announced the launch of its public art project "Unboxing JD Museum," which will tour three cities—Beijing, Suqian, and Shenzhen—starting in May. 昨天，京东美术馆官宣启动公共艺术项目「开箱计划」（Unboxing JD Museum），将于 5 月起在北京、宿迁、深圳三城巡展。

The project uses JD Express cardboard boxes as its medium, with the core carrier being the mobile exhibition hall "Cardboard Box Pavilion," jointly designed by Shenzhen Daxing Jizi and Beijing Small Production. The pavilion will feature multi-media content including video, installations, and sound. 项目以京东快递纸箱为媒介，核心载体为由深圳大星吉子与北京 Small Production 联合设计的移动展厅「纸箱亭」，展亭内将呈现影像、装置、声音等多媒介内容。

During the Beijing debut, an online creative challenge will be simultaneously launched, featuring two tracks: handicraft and AI. It will also collaborate with JD Philanthropy's "Starlight Transmission" program to exhibit paintings by rural children. Furthermore, the project has initiated surveys and interviews with over a hundred artists and scholars worldwide, with the results to be preserved as digital archives and publications. 北京首站期间同步发起线上创作挑战赛，设手工与 AI 两大赛道，并联合京东公益「星光传递」计划展出乡村儿童绘画作品。此外，项目还面向全球逾百位艺术家与学者发起问卷及访谈，成果将以数字档案与出版物形式留存。

item.title: 《穿普拉达的女王 2》今日上映
item.guid: 《穿普拉达的女王-2》今日上映
item.description:
"The Devil Wears Prada 2" officially premiered today, hitting cinemas nationwide. 《穿普拉达的女王 2》今天正式上映，登陆全国院线。

The film focuses on the impact of the digital age on traditional fashion media — the once authoritative magazine "Runway" faces an existential crisis, leading "fashion devil" Miranda (Meryl Streep) to collaborate once again with her former assistant Andy (Anne Hathaway). 影片将视角对准数字时代对传统时尚媒体的冲击 —— 昔日权威杂志《Runway》面临生存危机，「时尚女魔头」米兰达（梅丽尔·斯特里普 饰）与前助理安迪（安妮·海瑟薇 饰）再度合作。

item.title: DC《超级少女》确认引进
item.guid: DC《超级少女》确认引进
item.description:
According to Douban Movies, DC Films' new superhero movie "Supergirl" has been confirmed for release in mainland China, with the release date yet to be determined. 据豆瓣电影消息，DC 影业超英新片《超级少女》已确认引进中国内地，档期待定。

The plot is adapted from the highly acclaimed DC comic "Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow," telling the story of Kara, who, to save her beloved dog Krypto, teams up with an unexpectedly met partner, and together they embark on a race against time. 剧情改编自高口碑 DC 漫画《超级少女：明日之女》，讲述卡拉为拯救爱犬小氪，与意外结识的伙伴组成搭档，二人携手展开一场与时间赛跑的行动。
